title: QIAseq FastSelect Fragmentation
author: Opentrons
description: This is Part 2 to the QIAseq FastSelect Protocol. This protocol is used to perform the addition of samples with mastermix into a plate. Links: * [Part 1: Sample Normalization](http://protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/0b97ae) * [Part 2: QIAseq FastSelect Fragmentation](http://protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/0b97ae-protocol-2A)
steps_raw: This is Part 2 to the QIAseq FastSelect Protocol. This protocol is used to perform the addition of samples with mastermix into a plate. Links: * [Part 1: Sample Normalization](http://protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/0b97ae) * [Part 2: QIAseq FastSelect Fragmentation](http://protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/0b97ae-protocol-2A)
The diluted RNA plate will be placed on the temperature module placed on site 7.
The Mastermix Plate will be placed on temperature module placed on site 10. The volume for the MasterMix will be adjust in the protocol, depending on the RNA 	Volume put into the drop down.
materials_raw: Applied Biosystems Enduraplate 96 Aluminum Block 220 µL
Opentrons 96 Well Aluminum Block with Bio-Rad Well Plate 200 µL
